creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 211171
fractal-4.2.2-libressl3.0.x.patch

The vendored openssl{,-sys} crates predate having LibreSSL 3.0.x support. Backport from the first version with said support.

While here, use the GNOME group since the repository was moved there, and use the USE_GSTREAMER1 framework for gstreamer1-editing-services. No functional changes.
